state_explanation: J6 slightly ahead — residual 9.8 vs forecast 15.1 vs DA 36.6. Empire intel adding mild edge over both pure macro lines.
doctrine: Three-way race: forecast (pure macro), DA (inverse falsifier), J6 (empire intel-curated). State values: forecast_winning_decisive (bull thesis confirmed) | devils_winning_decisive (inverse path) | j6_winning_decisive (empire intel adding alpha, promote overrides) | forecast_leading / devils_leading / j6_leading (mild edges) | convergence (rare alignment, highest conviction) | both_wrong (2-way models broken) | all_three_wrong (stale model, re-run 6-model triangulation, leverage zero) | mixed (no clear winner). J6 states only fire after 3+ sweeps of J6 history (warm-up).
